questions.text: Riya finds old newspapers and bottle caps at home. She plans to use them to create something for her school display. What choice best shows creative thinking?

options.text: Throw them away and buy new craft items
Use the waste items to design a new art piece
Wait for someone else to tell her what to make

questions.text: Ayaan wants to draw a picture for his art story. He has seen many similar drawings before. What would make his artwork truly creative?

options.text: Copying a picture exactly from a book
Leaving the page blank to avoid mistakes
Adding his own ideas and colors to the drawing

questions.text: Two friends are building a play fort using boxes. One follows instructions, the other changes the design to solve problems. Which action shows creativity in the story?

options.text: Stopping when the boxes don’t fit
Changing the design to make the fort stronger
Waiting for an adult to build it instead

questions.text: Meera writes an art story about a talking tree. How can she make the story more creative?

options.text: Using only one sentence again and again
Giving the tree feelings and a unique problem
Ending the story without any ideas

questions.text: During art time, a child taps different objects to make sounds for a story scene. What makes this activity creative?

options.text: Exploring new sounds to match the story mood
Using objects only for their normal purpose
Stopping because instruments are not available
